stemHtml: You are flying above VNO for a short period of time (no longer than 2 minutes), but remain below VNE. Is this acceptable?

options.a: Yes, when exercising caution and flying in smooth air conditions.
options.b: No, as structural damage can occur even in smooth air.
options.c: Yes, but only when remaining within the green arc.
options.d: Yes, when making normal manoeuvres, and only in moderate turbulence.
